channel.title: AI Dev Daily
channel.description: Daily 60-minute podcast for developers on the latest AI tools, Claude Code, Codex, LLMs, and best practices.
channel.itunes:author: AI Dev Daily

item.title: AI Dev Daily — Tuesday, June 23, 2026
item.description: Good morning, and welcome to AI Dev Daily. I'm Sophie, and today is Tuesday, June 23, 2026. This is your daily deep dive into everything that matters for developers building with AI, from the latest m...
